Package noppes.npcs.api.event

Interface IChainEvent

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ICustomNPCsEvent
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IChainEvent.CompleteEvent, IChainEvent.InterruptEvent, IChainEvent.NextEvent, IChainEvent.StartEvent
    public interface IChainEvent
extends ICustomNPCsEvent
    Events related to chained ability execution lifecycle. These fire at chain-level transitions, not per-ability. Unified for both NPCs and Players.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      static interface  IChainEvent.CompleteEvent
      Fired when a chained ability sequence completes all entries.
      static interface  IChainEvent.InterruptEvent
      Fired when a chained ability is interrupted by damage.
      static interface  IChainEvent.NextEvent
      Fired when the chain advances to the next entry in the sequence.
      static interface  IChainEvent.StartEvent
      Fired when a chained ability sequence starts executing.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.ICustomNPCsEvent

        ICustomNPCsEvent.CNPCNaturalSpawnEvent, ICustomNPCsEvent.ScriptedCommandEvent

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IChainedAbility getChain()
      Get the chained ability being executed.
      IEntityLivingBase getEntity()
      Get the entity executing the chain (NPC or Player).
      int getEntryIndex()
      Get the current entry index within the chain (0-based).
      ICustomNpc<?> getNpc()
      Get the NPC executing the chain, or null if the caster is a player.
      IPlayer getPlayer()
      Get the player executing the chain, or null if the caster is an NPC.
      IEntityLivingBase getTarget()
      Get the target of the chain, or null if no target.
      boolean isNPC()
      Whether the entity executing the chain is an NPC.

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.ICustomNPCsEvent

        getHookName

    • Method Detail

      • getEntity

        IEntityLivingBase getEntity()
        Get the entity executing the chain (NPC or Player).
        Returns:
        the entity executing the chain

      • getPlayer

        IPlayer getPlayer()
        Get the player executing the chain, or null if the caster is an NPC.
        Returns:
        the player executing the chain, or null if NPC

      • getNpc

        ICustomNpc<?> getNpc()
        Get the NPC executing the chain, or null if the caster is a player.
        Returns:
        the NPC executing the chain, or null if player

      • isNPC

        boolean isNPC()
        Whether the entity executing the chain is an NPC.
        Returns:
        true if the executor is an NPC

      • getChain

        IChainedAbility getChain()
        Get the chained ability being executed.
        Returns:
        the chained ability being executed

      • getTarget

        IEntityLivingBase getTarget()
        Get the target of the chain, or null if no target.
        Returns:
        the current target entity

      • getEntryIndex

        int getEntryIndex()
        Get the current entry index within the chain (0-based).
        Returns:
        the current entry index in the chain
